title: skillprism.yaml
description: Project-level configuration file for skillprism (skillprism.yaml). Determines which harnesses to build for and where skills live.

harnesses.description: List of harness IDs to build for (e.g., claude, codex, opencode, factory, pi)

harnesses_dir.description: Directory for user override harness definitions (default: harnesses)

name.description: Optional project name used in manifest generation
